prestazioni: Engine: Type 911/72 (3.8L flat-six, air-cooled, 4-valve per cylinder) with a custom-built 4.0L stroker kit using Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (102.5mm bore, 80.4mm stroke), Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft from JE Pistons for 450+ hp at 8,500 RPM on VP Racing Q16 fuel.

Forced Induction: Single Garrett GTX4202R turbocharger (86mm compressor, 76mm turbine) with a custom 3.5-inch titanium exhaust manifold by Akrapović, paired with a GReddy Type-R intercooler and a custom 45mm wastegate from Turbosmart for 1.5 bar (21.7 psi) boost pressure.

Suspension & Chassis: Full Öhlins TTX40 4-way adjustable coilovers with spherical bearing top mounts, custom 24mm front and 28mm rear anti-roll bars from H&R, and a full chassis reinforcement kit from GT3 Cup-spec roll cage by Matter Fab, including front and rear strut tower braces and a 911 RSR-spec rear subframe reinforcement plate.
estetica: Aerodynamics: Full 911 RSR (991.2) wide-body conversion kit by RWB (Rauh-Welt Begriff) with custom carbon fiber front splitter, rear diffuser, and a 911 GT3 R-spec rear wing (2,000mm width) with adjustable carbon fiber endplates for 500+ kg of downforce at 200 km/h.

Bodywork: Full carbon fiber body panels (hood, doors, fenders, rear quarter panels) from 911 RSR (991.2) by Porsche Motorsport, painted in historic Gulf Racing livery with custom vinyl overlays by Avery Dennison for a matte finish, including a functional roof scoop for engine bay cooling.

Wheels & Brakes: Custom 18x12.5-inch front and 18x14-inch rear BBS RS-GT1 wheels (991 RSR-spec) with 30mm and 40mm spacers, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (305/645-R18 front, 325/705-R18 rear). Braking system features 410mm front and 390mm rear carbon-ceramic rotors (PCCB) with 6-piston front and 4-piston rear calipers from the 911 GT2 RS, paired with Ferodo DS3000 brake pads.
